mapper.select: /* MplatformOpenMapper.getMplatformOpenTrgtList */ SELECT A.RES_NO AS resNo , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP OSST , MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP RSV WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND OSST.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = OSST.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'PC2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND OSST.OSST_ORD_NO = RSV.OSST_ORD_NO AND RSV.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') AND TRUNC(A.REQ_IN_DAY) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0073' AND USG_YN = 'Y') AND B.DLVRY_NO IS NOT NULL AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3' AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '6' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'OP2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000')

/* MplatformOpenMapper.getMplatformOpenRetryList */ SELECT A.RES_NO AS oldResNo , A.REQUEST_KEY AS oldRequestKey , SQ_RCP_REQUEST_KEY_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP AS requestKey , SQ_RCP_RES_NO_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP AS resNo , SQ_RCP_REQUEST_STATE_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP AS newStateKey , RSV.TLPH_NO AS tlphNo , RSV.TLPH_NO_STAT_CD AS tlphNoStatCd , RSV.ASGN_AGNC_ID AS asgnAgncId , RSV.TLPH_NO_OWN_CMPN_CD AS tlphNoOwnCmpnCd , RSV.OPEN_SVC_IND_CD AS openSvcIndCd , RSV.ENCD_TLPH_NO AS encdTlphNo FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP RSV WHERE LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND RSV.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'NU2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000' AND IF_TYPE = 'RSV') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND SEQ > RSV.SEQ AND IF_TYPE = 'RRS') AND TRUNC(A.REQ_IN_DAY) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0073' AND USG_YN = 'Y') AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3' AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '6' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = RSV.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'OP2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000')
mapper.insert: /* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestCstmr */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYS_RDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,SELF_CERT_TYPE ,SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,SELF_ISSU_NUM ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYSDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,SELF_CERT_TYPE ,SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,SELF_ISSU_NUM ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestSaleinfo */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestDlvry */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,SYS_RDATE ,TB_CD ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,SYSDATE ,TB_CD ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestReq */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYSDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestMove */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,OSST_PAY_DAY ,OSST_PAY_TYPE ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYSDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,OSST_PAY_DAY ,OSST_PAY_TYPE FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestPay */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYS_RDATE ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestAgent */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYS_RDATE ,MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYSDATE ,MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestState */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP (REQUEST_STATE_KEY ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,DLVRY_NO ,OPEN_NO ,MEMO ,SYS_RDATE ,RIP ,RID ,VIEW_FLAG ,RES_NO ,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{newStateKey} ,'00' ,DLVRY_NO ,OPEN_NO ,MEMO ,SYSDATE ,RIP ,RID ,VIEW_FLAG ,#{resNo} ,#{requestKey} ,TB_CD ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestChange */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,SYS_RDATE ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestDvcChg */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertCopyRequestAddition */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{oldRequestKey}
mapper.select: /* MplatformOpenMapper.getTcpResult */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP A WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(#{resNo}, 14, '0') AND A.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = A.MVNO_ORD_NO AND PRGR_STAT_CD = #{appEventCd} AND RSLT_CD = '0000')

/* MplatformOpenMapper.getOpenCntrList_X */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS svcCntrNo , B.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY IS NULL AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(B.RES_NO, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'OP2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000')

/* MplatformOpenMapper.getOpenCntrList */ SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo , B.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , B.RES_NO AS resNo , DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', '1', '0') AS mnpIndCd , B.SCAN_ID AS scanId , B.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType , C.CSTMR_POST AS zipCd FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP C , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D WHERE A.PRGR_STAT_CD = 'OP2' AND A.RSLT_CD = '0000' AND TO_NUMBER(A.MVNO_ORD_NO) = B.RES_NO AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND (D.SCAN_ID IS NULL OR D.SRL_IF_ID = 0)
mapper.insert: /* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequest */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST (REQUEST_KEY ,MANAGER_CODE ,AGENT_CODE ,SERVICE_TYPE ,OPER_TYPE ,CSTMR_TYPE ,RES_CODE ,RES_MSG ,RES_NO ,CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG ,CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG ,ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE ,ONLINE_AUTH_INFO ,PSTATE ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,OPEN_NO ,FILE01 ,FILE01_MASK ,FAXYN ,FAXNUM ,SCAN_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,RIP ,OPEN_REQ_DATE ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,REQ_MODEL_NAME ,REQ_MODEL_COLOR ,REQ_PHONE_SN ,REQ_USIM_SN ,REQ_PAY_TYPE ,REQ_ADDITION ,SHOP_CD ,APP_FORM_YN ,REQ_IN_DAY ,CONTRACT_NUM ,ETC_SPECIAL ,REQ_USIM_NAME ,PHONE_PAYMENT ,REQ_ADDITION_PRICE ,APP_FORM_XML_YN ,SPC_CODE ,CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,SHOP_USM_ID ,MEMO ,REC_YN ,OPEN_MARKET_REFERER ,SO_CD ,NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_CD ,CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG ,SHOP_NM ,PROD_ID ,CRET_ID ,BANNER_CD ,SNTY_COLOR_CD ,SNTY_CAPAC_CD ,PROD_TYPE ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE ,CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG ,CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG ,PROMOTION_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,MANAGER_CODE ,AGENT_CODE ,SERVICE_TYPE ,OPER_TYPE ,CSTMR_TYPE ,RES_CODE ,RES_MSG ,RES_NO ,CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG ,CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG ,ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE ,ONLINE_AUTH_INFO ,PSTATE ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,OPEN_NO ,FILE01 ,FILE01_MASK ,FAXYN ,FAXNUM ,SCAN_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,RIP ,OPEN_REQ_DATE ,SYSDATE ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,REQ_MODEL_NAME ,REQ_MODEL_COLOR ,REQ_PHONE_SN ,REQ_USIM_SN ,REQ_PAY_TYPE ,REQ_ADDITION ,SHOP_CD ,APP_FORM_YN ,SYSDATE ,CONTRACT_NUM ,ETC_SPECIAL ,REQ_USIM_NAME ,PHONE_PAYMENT ,REQ_ADDITION_PRICE ,APP_FORM_XML_YN ,SPC_CODE ,CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,SHOP_USM_ID ,MEMO ,REC_YN ,OPEN_MARKET_REFERER ,SO_CD ,NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_CD ,CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG ,SHOP_NM ,PROD_ID ,CRET_ID ,BANNER_CD ,SNTY_COLOR_CD ,SNTY_CAPAC_CD ,PROD_TYPE ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE ,CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG ,CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG ,PROMOTION_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestCstmr */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR (REQUEST_KEY ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYS_RDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYSDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestSaleinfo */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO (REQUEST_KEY ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestDlvry */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY (REQUEST_KEY ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,SYS_RDATE ,TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,SYSDATE ,TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestReq */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_REQ (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYSDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_REQ WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestMove */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_MOVE (REQUEST_KEY ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYSDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_MOVE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestPay */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestAgent */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_AGENT (REQUEST_KEY ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_AGENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestState */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_STATE (REQUEST_STATE_KEY ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,DLVRY_NO ,OPEN_NO ,MEMO ,SYS_RDATE ,RIP ,RID ,VIEW_FLAG ,RES_NO ,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_STATE_KEY ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,DLVRY_NO ,OPEN_NO ,MEMO ,SYSDATE ,RIP ,RID ,VIEW_FLAG ,RES_NO ,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_STATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestChange */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE (REQUEST_KEY ,NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestDvcChg */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG (REQUEST_KEY ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* MplatformOpenMapper.insertMspRequestAddition */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_ADDITION (REQUEST_KEY ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_ADDITION WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)
mapper.update: /* MplatformOpenMapper.updateMspRequestDtl */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DTL SET ( SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, OPEN_AGNT_CD, RES_NO, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM, OPER_TYPE, OPER_TYPE_NM , MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_COMPANY_NM, SALE_PLCY_CD, SALE_PLCY_NM, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM , RECOMMEND_INFO, REC_YN, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REQ_IN_DAY, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_NM, JOIN_PRICE , USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, USIM_PAY_MTHD_NM, USIM_PRICE, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT , CSTMR_TYPE, REQUEST_KEY, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, SHOP_USM_ID, PROD_TYPE, PROD_TYPE_NM , REQ_USIM_NAME, PROMOTION_CD, REAL_SHOP_NM ) = ( SELECT A.SCAN_ID , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , A.RES_NO , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', A.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , A.OPER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9001', A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_TYPE_NM , C.MOVE_COMPANY , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9005', C.MOVE_COMPANY) AS MOVE_COMPANY_NM , FN_GET_SALECD(A.CONTRACT_NUM , D.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE) AS SALE_PCY_CD , (SELECT SALE_PLCY_NM FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST WHERE SALE_PLCY_CD = FN_GET_SALECD(A.CONTRACT_NUM, D.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE)) AS SALE_PLCY_NM , A.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , E.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9011', E.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD) AS RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM , E.RECOMMEND_INFO , A.REC_YN , A.SHOP_CD , DECODE(A.SHOP_CD, NULL, NVL(A.SHOP_NM, '-'), (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.SHOP_CD)) AS SHOP_NM , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQ_IN_DAY , D.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0048', D.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD) AS JOIN_PAY_MTHD_NM , D.JOIN_PRICE , D.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0056', D.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD) AS USIM_PAY_MTHD_NM , D.USIM_PRICE , D.RENTAL_BASE_AMT , D.RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT , D.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT , A.CSTMR_TYPE , A.REQUEST_KEY , A.REQ_PAY_TYPE , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE , A.SHOP_USM_ID , A.PROD_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0063', A.PROD_TYPE) AS PROD_TYPE_NM , A.REQ_USIM_NAME , A.PROMOTION_CD , A.REAL_SHOP_NM FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP C , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP D , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP E WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY ) WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo}

/* MplatformOpenMapper.updateJuoSubInfo_X */ UPDATE MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SET (SUB_ADR_ZIP, SRL_IF_ID, MNP_IND_CD, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, OSST_YN) = ( SELECT B.CSTMR_POST , A.RES_NO , DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', '1', '0') AS MNP_IND_CD , A.SCAN_ID , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , 'Y' FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} ) WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo}
mapper.select:
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteOpenFailList */
SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY , A.RES_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A WHERE TRUNC(A.REQ_IN_DAY) <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '5' AND A.SCAN_ID IS NULL AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IS NULL
mapper.delete: /* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequest */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestCstmr */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestSaleinfo */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestSaleinfo */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestReq */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestMove */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestPayment */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestAgent */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestState */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestChange */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestDvcChg */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestAddition */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcpMgmtMapper.deleteRequestOsst */ DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(MVNO_ORD_NO)) = #{resNo}
